name: WMNF 88.5 FM Submit Your Music Form
country: United States / Tampa Florida / community radio, FM broadcast and global streaming audience
manualReviewReason: Official public form collects artist metadata, contact email, release metadata and audio upload/files; file selection, rights, clean/radio-safe status, focus tracks and owner-approved notes require manual review before any submission.
activityEvidence: Official WMNF site had 2026 station/music posts and current Submit your music page.

name: WWOZ Getting Airplay Music Director Route
country: United States / New Orleans Louisiana / community radio, local culture and global online audience
manualReviewReason: WWOZ prefers a physical finished CD package or WAV-format digital material, asks artists to target relevant shows, mark profanity/clean edits and mail/drop off copies; packaging, local fit, rights and clean-content review are manual-only.
activityEvidence: Official WWOZ site had 2026 music/events activity and an active musician resource route.

name: KDVS 90.3 FM Music Department Physical Submission Route
country: United States / Davis California / freeform college-community radio and online stream
manualReviewReason: Official KDVS contact page lists the Music Directors and states new music should be sent to the mailing address as physical submissions only; physical packaging, address use, rights and radio-safe metadata require manual handling.
activityEvidence: Official KDVS site exposes stream, schedule/chart navigation and current department contact page.

name: KAOS 89.3FM Olympia Submit Music Route
country: United States / Olympia Washington / hybrid college-community radio and online stream
manualReviewReason: KAOS prioritizes physical submissions, rejects singles, requires one-sheet/press release details and FCC violation/clean edit notes, and asks digital submissions to use links rather than attachments; fit and compliance checks require manual review.
activityEvidence: Official KAOS site had May 2026 blog posts, charts and active Submit Music route.

name: KMNR 89.7 FM Music Director Route
country: United States / Rolla Missouri / free-format college radio and webstream
manualReviewReason: The official site exposes a Music Director role/email and mailing address but no complete static submission form; outreach copy, media format, rights, clean-content status and station fit require owner-approved manual review.
activityEvidence: Official KMNR site has 2026 blog activity, live webstream and current E-Board contacts.
